Rarity: RARE Sorrow Strap Cord Belt Hunter Item Item Level: 87 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Discipline and Training Can be Anointed Quality (Life and Mana Modifiers): +20% +16 to maximum Energy Shield +162 to maximum Life 7% increased maximum Life +37% to Fire Resistance +13% to Lightning Resistance {crafted}+13% to Cold and Chaos Resistances Split

PathOfBuilding.Notes:
LEVEL 1 endurance charge on stun and Level 1 fortify are both good 7 links for mirage.
IF YOU DONT HAVE SYNAPTIC RINGS with foulborn ghostwrithe: Go lightning penetration instead of endurance charge on stun Take the 15% invert elemental res on the elemental mastery Get hydrosphere or lightning exposure on gloves
